subject:
conoco, inc. - missing deal for may 00 production - important,
 please read

emails.subject:
Conoco, Inc. - missing deal for May 00 production - important,
 PLEASE READ
emails.subject_base:
Conoco, Inc. - missing deal for May 00 production - important,
 PLEASE READ
emails.body: Conoco, Inc. missing deal for May 00 production important, PLEASE READ Daren, I left you a message regarding this matter 2 days ago. Was wondering if you had time to look into this. Conoco is saying that we are missing one day of sale to them: 5/5 10,000 mmbtu at 2.95, deal #256686. I am not seeing this in Sitara. Could you please confirm? Customer has already called twice asking us to invoice them for this. Thanks for your help on this. Joanie x36574
